name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ Tap /start to open the menu, then pick what you want from the buttons.

• Add coins to your watchlist
• Set price alerts and % move rules
• Check live prices anytime
• Configure quiet hours and summary time

Everything in this bot is reachable by tapping — no commands to remember.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
